description: The Chinook music store database is open in LibreOffice Base. Standardize the artist names for cataloging purposes by creating an audit table named 'ArtistNameLog' with columns 'ArtistId' (INTEGER) and 'OriginalName' (VARCHAR(120)). For all artists in the 'Artist' table whose names currently start with 'The ', record their original details in 'ArtistNameLog' and update the 'Artist' table to change these names to the format 'Name, The' (e.g., 'Beatles, The'). Save the database to persist your changes. Hint: In HSQLDB, you can use SUBSTRING(col, start) and the concatenation operator ||.
